alse\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None:\\n        total_steps = max(TRAIN_MAX_STEPS, 1)\\n    else:\\n        total_steps = max(steps_per_epoch * 30, 1)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Enable a budget-aligned cosine schedule and slightly stronger optimization scale so the fixed 256-step run uses a higher early LR and smoother late decay, which is typically beneficial for short-budget MLP training.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\",\"indexing\"]}"}}
